documents.original: ਅਨੰਦੁ ਭਇਆ ਮੇਰੀ ਮਾਏ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਮੈ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
documents.transliteration: anand bha-i-aa mayree maa-ay satguroo mai paa-i-aa.
documents.text: I am in bliss, O my mother, for I have found my True Guru.

documents.original: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਤ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਹਜ ਸੇਤੀ ਮਨਿ ਵਜੀਆ ਵਾਧਾਈਆ ॥
documents.transliteration: satgur ta paa-i-aa sahj saytee man vajee-aa vaaDhaa-ee-aa.
documents.text: I found the True Guru with intuitive ease, and my mind vibrates with bliss.

documents.original: ਏ ਮਨ ਚੰਚਲਾ ਚਤੁਰਾਈ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
documents.transliteration: ay man chanchalaa chaturaa-ee kinai na paa-i-aa.
documents.text: O fickle mind, no one has found God through clever tricks.

documents.original: ਏ ਮਨ ਪਿਆਰਿਆ ਤੂ ਸਦਾ ਸਚੁ ਸਮਾਲੇਹਿ ॥
documents.transliteration: ay man pi-aari-aa too sadaa sach samaaleh.
documents.text: O beloved mind, contemplate the True Lord forever.

documents.original: ਆਵਹੁ ਸੰਤ ਮਿਲਹੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਭਾਈ ਮਿਲਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵਾ ॥
documents.transliteration: aavhu sant milhu mayray bhaa-ee mil har har naam Dhi-aavaa.
documents.text: Come, O saints, let us meet together, O my brothers. Let us meet together and meditate on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

documents.original: ਸੁਣਿ ਸੁਣਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਨਿ ਆਨੰਦੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
documents.transliteration: sun sun har har naam man aanand ho-ay.
documents.text: Hearing, hearing the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, the mind is filled with bliss.

documents.original: ਪਵਿਤ੍ਰ ਪਾਵਨ ਸੇ ਜਨ ਜਿਨ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥
documents.transliteration: pavitar paavan say jan jin har kaa naam Dhi-aa-i-aa.
documents.text: Pure and holy are those who meditate on the Name of the Lord.

documents.original: ਵਾਜੇ ਪੰਚ ਸਬਦ ਤਿਤੁ ਘਰਿ ਸਭਾਗੈ ॥
documents.transliteration: vaajay panch sabad tit ghar subhaagai.
documents.text: The Panch Shabad, the five sounds, vibrate in that most fortunate of homes.

documents.original: ਤੁਸੀ ਕਹਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਅਨੰਦੁ ਹੋਆ ॥
documents.transliteration: tusee kahhu naanak anand ho-aa.
documents.text: O Nanak, say: bliss has come.

documents.original: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
documents.transliteration: ik-oNkaar sat naam kartaa purakh nirbha-o nirvair akaal moorat ajoonee saibhaN gur prasaad.
documents.text: One Universal Creator God. The Name is Truth. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred. Image of the Timeless One. Beyond Birth. Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace.

documents.original: ਜਪੁ ॥ ਆਦਿ ਸਚੁ ਜੁਗਾਦਿ ਸਚੁ ॥ ਹੈ ਭੀ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਹੋਸੀ ਭੀ ਸਚੁ ॥੧॥
documents.transliteration: Jap. Aad sach jugaad sach. Hai bhee sach naanak hosee bhee sach. ||1||
documents.text: Meditate. True in the beginning, True through all the ages. True here and now, O Nanak, True forevermore. ||1||

documents.original: ਸੋਚੈ ਸੋਚਿ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਜੇ ਸੋਚੀ ਲਖ ਵਾਰ ॥
documents.transliteration: sochai soch na hova-ee je sochee lakh vaar.
documents.text: By thinking, He cannot be reduced to thought, even by thinking hundreds of thousands of times.

documents.original: ਚੁਪੈ ਚੁਪ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਜੇ ਲਾਇ ਰਹਾ ਲਿਵ ਤਾਰ ॥
documents.transliteration: chupai chup na hova-ee je laa-ay rahaa liv taar.
documents.text: By remaining silent, inner silence is not obtained, even by remaining lovingly absorbed deep within.

documents.original: ਭੁਖਿਆ ਭੁਖ ਨ ਉਤਰੀ ਜੇ ਬੰਨਾ ਪੁਰੀਆ ਭਾਰ ॥
documents.transliteration: bhukhi-aa bhukh na utree je bannaa puree-aa bhaar.
documents.text: The hunger of the hungry is not appeased, even by piling up loads of worldly goods.

documents.original: ਸਹਸ ਸਿਆਣਪਾ ਲਖ ਹੋਹਿ ਤ ਇਕ ਨ ਚਲੈ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
documents.transliteration: sahas si-aanpaa lakh hohi ta ik na chalai naal.
documents.text: Hundreds of thousands of clever tricks, but not even one of them will go along with you in the end.

documents.original: ਕਿਵ ਸਚਿਆਰਾ ਹੋਈਐ ਕਿਵ ਕੂੜੈ ਤੁਟੈ ਪਾਲਿ ॥
documents.transliteration: kiv sachi-aaraa ho-ee-ai kiv koorhai tutai paal.
documents.text: So how can you become truthful? And how can the veil of illusion be torn away?

documents.original: ਹੁਕਮਿ ਰਜਾਈ ਚਲਣਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਨਾਲਿ ॥੨॥
documents.transliteration: hukam rajaa-ee chalnaa naanak likhi-aa naal. ||2||
documents.text: O Nanak, it is written that you shall obey the Hukam (Command) of His Will. ||2||

documents.original: ਹੁਕਮੀ ਹੋਵਨਿ ਆਕਾਰ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਕਹਿਆ ਜਾਈ ॥
documents.transliteration: hukmee hovan aakaar hukam na kahi-aa jaa-ee.
documents.text: By His Command, bodies are created. His Command cannot be described.

documents.original: ਹੁਕਮੀ ਹੋਵਨਿ ਜੀਅ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥
documents.transliteration: hukmee hovan jee-a hukam milai vadi-aa-ee.
documents.text: By His Command, souls come into being. By His Command, glory and greatness are obtained.

documents.original: ਹੁਕਮੀ ਉਤਮੁ ਨੀਚੁ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਲਿਖਿ ਦੁਖ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਈਅਹਿ ॥
documents.transliteration: hukmee utam neech hukam likh dukh sukh paa-ee-ah.
documents.text: By His Command, some are high and some are low. By His written Command, pain and pleasure are obtained.

documents.original: ਸਾਚਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਾਚੁ ਨਾਇ ਭਾਖਿਆ ਭਾਉ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥
documents.transliteration: saachaa saahib saach naa-ay bhaakhi-aa bhaa-o apaar.
documents.text: True is the Master, True is His Name — speak it with infinite love.

documents.original: ਥਾਪਿਆ ਨ ਜਾਇ ਕੀਤਾ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਸੋਇ ॥
documents.transliteration: thaapi-aa na jaa-ay keetaa na ho-ay. aapay aap niranjan so-ay.
documents.text: He cannot be established. He cannot be created. The Immaculate Lord is self-existent.

documents.original: ਤੀਰਥਿ ਨਾਵਾ ਜੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵਾ ਵਿਣੁ ਭਾਣੇ ਕਿ ਨਾਇ ਕਰੀ ॥
documents.transliteration: teerath naavaa je tis bhaavaa vin bhaanay ki naa-ay karee.
documents.text: If it pleases Him, I will bathe at the sacred pilgrimage site. Without His pleasure, what is the use of bathing?

documents.original: ਜੇ ਜੁਗ ਚਾਰੇ ਆਰਜਾ ਹੋਰ ਦਸੂਣੀ ਹੋਇ ॥
documents.transliteration: jay jug chaaray aarjaa hor dasoonee ho-ay.
documents.text: If you lived throughout the four ages, or even ten times more...

documents.original: ਸੁਣਿਐ ਈਸਰੁ ਬਰਮਾ ਇੰਦੁ ॥ ਸੁਣਿਐ ਮੁਖਿ ਸਾਲਾਹਣੁ ਮੰਦੁ ॥
documents.transliteration: suni-ai eesar barmaa ind. suni-ai mukh saalaahan mand.
documents.text: By listening — Shiva, Brahma and Indra. By listening — even foul-mouthed people praise Him.

documents.original: ਮੰਨੇ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਕਹੀ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥ ਜੇ ਕੋ ਕਹੈ ਪਿਛੈ ਪਛੁਤਾਇ ॥
documents.transliteration: manay kee gat kahee na jaa-ay. jay ko kahai pichai pachutaa-ay.
documents.text: The state of the believer cannot be described. One who tries to describe this shall regret the attempt.

documents.original: ਸੋ ਦਰੁ ਕੇਹਾ ਸੋ ਘਰੁ ਕੇਹਾ ਜਿਤੁ ਬਹਿ ਸਰਬ ਸਮਾਲੇ ॥
documents.transliteration: so dar kayhaa so ghar kayhaa jit beh sarab samaalay.
documents.text: Where is that Gate, and where is that Dwelling, in which You sit and take care of all?

documents.original: ਜਤੁ ਪਾਹਾਰਾ ਧੀਰਜੁ ਸੁਨਿਆਰੁ ॥ ਅਹਰਣਿ ਮਤਿ ਵੇਦੁ ਹਥੀਆਰੁ ॥
documents.transliteration: jat paahaaraa dheeraj suni-aar. ahran mat vayd hathee-aar.
documents.text: Make continence your furnace, patience your goldsmith; make understanding your anvil, and divine knowledge your hammer.

documents.original: ਸੋ ਦਰੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਕੇਹਾ ਸੋ ਘਰੁ ਕੇਹਾ ਜਿਤੁ ਬਹਿ ਸਰਬ ਸਮਾਲੇ ॥
documents.transliteration: so dar tayraa kayhaa so ghar kayhaa jit beh sarab samaalay.
documents.text: Where is Your Gate, O Lord? Where is Your Home, in which You sit and take care of all?

documents.original: ਵਾਜੇ ਤੇਰੇ ਨਾਦ ਅਨੇਕ ਅਸੰਖਾ ਕੇਤੇ ਤੇਰੇ ਵਾਵਣਹਾਰੇ ॥
documents.transliteration: vaajay tayray naad anayk asankhaa kaytay tayray vaavan-haaray.
documents.text: The countless musicians play upon so many instruments for You. How many are Your musicians?

documents.original: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥ ਤਿਤੁ ਸਰਵਰੜੈ ਭਈਲੇ ਨਿਵਾਸਾ ਪਾਣੀ ਪਾਵਕੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੀ ॥
documents.transliteration: aasaa mahilaa 1. tit saravar-rai bha-eelay nivaasaa paanee paavak sansaaree.
documents.text: In that pool of the world-ocean I have made my home; fire and water are both there.

documents.original: ਹਉ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੀ ਜਾਉ ਹਉ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੀ ਜਾਉ ਜਾਉ ਜਾਉ ਤੇਰੇ ਨਾਮ ਵਿਟਹੁ ॥
documents.transliteration: ha-o kurbaanee jaa-o ha-o kurbaanee jaa-o jaa-o jaa-o tayray naam vitahu.
documents.text: I am a sacrifice, I am a sacrifice, I am a sacrifice — sacrifice unto Your Name.

documents.original: ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋਈ ਕਰਸੀ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਕਰਣਾ ਜਾਈ ॥
documents.transliteration: jo tis bhaavai so-ee karsee hukam na karnaa jaa-ee.
documents.text: Whatever pleases Him, He does. His Command cannot be challenged.

documents.original: ਬੇੜਾ ਬੰਧਿ ਨ ਸਕਿਓ ਬੰਧਨ ਕੀ ਵੇਲਾ ॥ ਭਰਿਆ ਲੈ ਡੁਬੀਤਾ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਕਰਿ ਖੇਲਾ ॥
documents.transliteration: bayraa banDh na saki-o banDhan kee vaylaa. bhari-aa lai dubeetaa nirmal kar khaylaa.
documents.text: You could not even build the boat at the time of building; loaded with cargo, it has sunk. Make it immaculate and play!
